commands.review_summary:
The branch adds model-call content extraction and OTEL export plumbing, exposes diagnostic capture helpers/types through the plugin SDK, updates diagnostics-otel tests, and refreshes the SDK API baseline hash.

PR surface: Source +150, Tests +512, Generated 0. Total +662 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: a raw payload with user content followed by an `onPayload` replacement that has no extractable messages leaves the earlier raw capture in `state.modelContent`. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
